error.signature: AI tells a hiker in Sweden they cannot freely walk through forests / camp wild, or conversely that allemansrätten allows hunting / fires anywhere

verdict.summary: Sweden's allemansrätten (right of public access) is constitutionally protected — anyone can walk, swim, ski, pick berries/mushrooms, and camp 1 night on uncultivated land. Limits: no fires during fire-ban (eldningsförbud, often summer); no camping within sight of houses or for 2+ nights without permission; no hunting; no driving off-road; no damage. Norway and Finland have similar (allemansretten / jokamiehenoikeus). Iceland and Denmark more restrictive.

dead_ends.action: Light a campfire during summer eldningsförbud (fire ban)
dead_ends.why_fails: Eldningsförbud declared by local Länsstyrelsen during dry periods (June-Sept typical). Fines up to SEK 4000+ + criminal liability if fire spreads. Check brandriskprognos.se before any fire. Camping stoves usually still allowed; open fires not.

dead_ends.action: Camp on the same spot for a week, or pitch within sight of a house
dead_ends.why_fails: Allemansrätten allows 'one night' camping on uncultivated land (interpretation: 1-2 nights tolerated; 'inte mer än något dygn' / 'not more than a day or two'). Camping within sight of someone's home requires permission. Multiple nights = need landowner permission or move on.

dead_ends.action: Drive an off-road vehicle / mountain bike across uncultivated forest
dead_ends.why_fails: Allemansrätten covers walking, skiing, cycling on roads/paths — NOT off-road motor vehicles or mountain biking through sensitive vegetation. Damaging plants is an offense (Naturvårdslag).

dead_ends.action: Pick rare wild flowers or take birds eggs / nests
dead_ends.why_fails: Allemansrätten covers berries, mushrooms, common flowers. Protected species (orchids, fritillaria, etc.) prohibited. Bird eggs / nests fully protected. Naturvårdsverket lists protected species.

workarounds.action: Allemansrätten safe activities: walk, swim, ski, ice-skate (own risk), pick berries / mushrooms / common flowers, camp 1 night out of sight of homes. Carry out all garbage. Don't disturb wildlife / livestock.
Check eldningsförbud at brandriskprognos.se OR app SOS Alarm before any fire. Use designated fire pits at official campgrounds. Camping stoves generally exempt.

Multi-night wild camping or close to house: ask landowner permission. Most Swedes give it freely if you ask. Or use STF (Svenska Turistföreningen) huts and campgrounds — extensive network across Norrland.
Protected species: photograph only. Naturvårdsverket app + 'Artportalen' database for verification. National park rules supersede allemansrätten — strict.
